body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Remove single use scratch variables in the Jacobin update. There is one left todo, after a bug fix in the next ClimaCore release. This is mainly for readability, but it also results in a negligible speedup. 
This is mostly undoing changes I previously made to improve performance before the finite difference operator refactor.


<!---

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Remove temporary scratch quantities
